title: Labs
description: A 50 player FFA random event server, where players spawn on plates and have to be the last one standing to win!
body:
![A fan render of the Labs server](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/62c800dd0bebcb2e8e2ddde1b44a2e2759f4474a_0.webp)

Welcome to Labs, the ultimate gaming server that promises a unique and thrilling experience! Imagine spawning on individual plates, each one serving as your starting point in a world brimming with unpredictability and excitement. Labs is designed to keep you on your toes with a variety of random events that can occur at any moment, ensuring that no two gameplay sessions are ever the same.

In Labs, your adventure begins the moment you step onto your plate. From there, you'll face an array of challenges and surprises that will test your skills, strategy, and adaptability. Whether it's sudden changes in the environment, unexpected obstacles, or surprise power-ups, every moment in Labs is packed with potential for excitement and fun.

## Game Modes (Includes but not limited to):

- **Normal**: The classic experience where you simply spawn on a plate and events happen around you. It’s straightforward and perfect for those who enjoy the core unpredictability and challenge of Labs without any added twists.

- **Lucky Blocks**: Start with a block and break it to reveal a random surprise. It could be a helpful item, a tricky trap, or something completely unexpected. The element of chance makes every round in this mode thrilling and unpredictable.

- **Scrambled**: In this mode, you spawn on a plate at a random height, adding an extra layer of challenge and excitement. Adapt quickly to your new surroundings and strategize to survive and thrive from any elevation.

- **Quick Draw**: For those who love fast-paced action, this mode accelerates the pace of events. Experience the intensity of rapid-fire challenges that will test your reflexes and decision-making skills in a high-speed environment.

- **Build Off**: Spawn with 32 blocks and unleash your creativity. Whether building for defense, strategy, or sheer artistic expression, this mode encourages players to think on their feet and use their resources wisely.

- **One Plate**: Everyone spawns on one large plate, creating a communal and intense experience. Work together or compete for resources as random events unfold around you.

- **Shrunk**: Start on a smaller platform than usual, adding an extra layer of difficulty and requiring even more precise strategy and quick thinking to survive.

- **Arbitrary Items**: Receive random blocks every 10~ seconds, adding an unpredictable twist to your strategy and gameplay. Use these items creatively to overcome challenges and outlast your opponents.

## Features:

**Voting System**: One of the unique features of Labs is the ability for players to vote for the mode they want to play. This ensures that everyone has a say in the game, making each session more engaging and democratic. Players can easily cast their votes, adding an extra layer of community involvement and excitement to the server.

**Continuous Updates**: The server is continually updated with new content, ensuring that there's always something fresh and engaging for players. The developers are committed to enhancing the gameplay experience, adding new events, features, and improvements based on player feedback and innovative ideas.

Labs is not just about surviving the random events; it's also about thriving in a dynamic and ever-changing environment. Team up with friends or go solo, explore different strategies, and discover the best ways to navigate the challenges thrown your way. The community is vibrant and welcoming, making Labs a great place to meet new friends and share your gaming adventures.

Join Labs today and dive into a world where every plate holds a new possibility, and every moment is filled with fun and excitement. Whether you're a seasoned gamer or new to the scene, Labs offers an engaging and constantly evolving experience that will keep you coming back for more.
